commandDescription: Shows an invite link for this bot!
ephemeralOption: Set to "True" to show the response only to you
devNotice: This is a development version of the bot. Please use the production version for the best experience.
inviteLink: Click here to invite TripBot to your own server
advancedNote: Note: For advanced features you will need to give the bot more permissions.
supportServer: The {{serverType}} server is [{{guildName}} Discord]({{inviteUrl}}). If you have issues/questions, join and talk with Moonbear!
